name: sentinel-agent-payment-boundary-preflight
description: Deterministically inspect public agent and payment documents for authority, quote, replay, receipt, wallet-secret, and integrity boundaries.
long_description: A read-only, deterministic preflight for one or two inline public JSON, Markdown, or text documents. It performs fixed checks, returns cited clear/ambiguous/missing findings, executes no supplied content, fetches no requester-controlled URL, moves no funds, and expands no payer authority. An optional fixed-scope review is available only through a separate quote-first process.

tools.name: preflight_agent_payment_boundary
tools.description: Inspect one or two inline public documents using 11 deterministic agent-payment boundary checks. No URL fetch, code execution, wallet access, request submission, or payment.
